2026-03-10T13:15:00Z: Hardened Helm installations in setup-01-basic.sh: converted 'helm install' to 'helm upgrade --install' for k8tz and purelb to ensure idempotency and resumability during cluster setup re-runs, resolving 'cannot re-use a name that is still in use' errors.
2026-03-10T13:10:00Z: Hardened setup-01-basic.sh for resumability and idempotency: replaced 'kubectl create -f' with 'kubectl apply -f' for OLM, Rook-Ceph, and other infrastructure manifests to resolve 'AlreadyExists' errors for namespaces and resources during setup re-runs.
2026-03-10T12:45:00Z: Updated architecture documentation (RAG Stack Architecture.md, RAG-Build-Flow.mmd, RAG-Diagram.mmd) to reflect the hierarchical bootstrap layout (Phase 0-3) and explicit local registry dependencies for all infrastructure and RAG components. Added documentation for storage-node and inference-node topology.
2026-03-10T12:35:00Z: Hardened Rook-Ceph image isolation: explicitly prefixed CSI sidecar images with registry.hierocracy.home:5000 in infrastructure/rook-ceph/operator.yaml to prevent internet fallback. Updated scripts/install-image-plan.sh with correct CSI versions (v3.15.0/v5.2.0/v8.2.1) to ensure all required images are mirrored during prefetch.
2026-03-10T11:45:00Z: Resolved 'wipe-disks' Job timeouts by reordering setup-01-basic.sh to apply Pod Security 'privileged' labels to the rook-ceph namespace before the wipe routine. Enhanced infrastructure/rook-ceph/wipe-disks.sh to be idempotent and provide better error diagnostics on failure.
2026-03-10T11:20:00Z: Fixed race condition in local-registry bootstrap: reordered infrastructure/registry/install.sh to wait for the registry pod to be ready before attempting to seed images to the LoadBalancer IP (172.20.1.26:5000). Hardened setup-01-basic.sh by enabling 'set -e', making namespace creation idempotent, and ensuring journal steps are only marked as 'done' if the underlying commands succeed. Updated scripts/k8s-install-helper-functions.sh to return non-zero exit codes on wait failures.
2026-03-10T10:00:00Z: Fixed critical bootstrap and APM issues for fresh v1.5.8 install: corrected Pulsar nodeSelector indentation and shifted to in-cluster registry (registry.container-registry.svc.cluster.local:5000) for internal pulls; migrated Tempo to the unified grafana/tempo chart (Single Binary with S3 storage) to resolve deprecation warnings; and stabilized Rook-Ceph bootstrap by switching to kubectl rollout status for CSI plugins.
2026-03-10T08:35:00Z: Upgraded cluster version to 1.5.8. Implemented strict node affinity for GPU Operator components, restricting them to inference nodes. Refined the NVIDIA Talos validation-fix to remove unnecessary host mounts while maintaining essential symlink creation for Talos/GPU compatibility.
2026-03-10T08:05:00Z: Added scripts/cleanup-old-images.sh to manage Podman image storage on hierophant: allows listing and pruning of images older than 7 days (168h) while preserving in-use images like the registry.
2026-03-10T07:35:00Z: Optimized cluster image bootstrap by introducing a host-side registry mirror at hierophant (172.20.0.1:5000); updated Talos registry patch to include hierophant as a fallback mirror; reordered setup-01-basic.sh to apply patches and populate the host mirror early; and removed redundant DaemonSet-based prefetching (rook-ceph-image-prefetch) to prevent 9x internet download storms on 9-node clusters.
2026-03-10T06:30:00Z: Resolved build pipeline bootstrap and registry URL mismatch: moved registry installation earlier in setup-01-basic.sh (after Rook-Ceph) to ensure availability for image seeding; updated build-orchestrator and bootstrap scripts to dynamically use internal registry URL (registry.container-registry.svc.cluster.local:5000) for in-cluster builds while preserving external URL (registry.hierocracy.home:5000) for host-side scripting; and added external DNS name to Talos registry mirrors to support consistent pull behavior.
2026-03-09T20:14:23Z: Added Helm runtime image coverage to scripts/install-image-plan.sh: introduced IMAGE_GROUPS[helm-runtime] with chart-rendered refs (k8tz, purelb, kube-state-metrics, traefik, grafana stack, and qualified NVIDIA gpu-operator refs) and wired helm-runtime into step mappings for basic/apm/nvidia/rag-stack. GPU symbolic image-name mapping was intentionally deferred.
2026-03-09T20:04:11Z: Strengthened local-first image sourcing while preserving optional remote refresh fallback: updated Pulsar defaults and secondary image args/env refs (OLM configmap server/util image, cert-manager ACME solver image, CNPG OPERATOR_IMAGE_NAME) to use registry.hierocracy.home:5000-prefixed paths, expanded install-image-plan bootstrap coverage for those images, and enhanced scripts/audit-image-sources.sh to detect these secondary refs and treat registry:2 as an explicit bootstrap exception.
2026-03-08T19:17:20Z: Stabilized cluster-native build pipeline and image caching: added cache-first mirror/backup/restore tooling, prefetch and audit scripts, image-plan update tooling, fresh-install journal cleanup, immutable orchestrator tag support, bounded task retries with dead-lettering, fixed Pulsar task payload publishing, switched builds to local registry base images, and patched service Dockerfiles/contracts/migrations for Iteration 6 Phase 1 memory scaffolding.
2026-03-08T13:36:41Z: Improved build-orchestrator deployment resilience in build-pipeline bootstrap: set imagePullPolicy=Always for registry.hierocracy.home:5000/build-orchestrator:latest, and updated build-pipeline/install.sh to force rollout restart after apply and emit detailed diagnostics (deploy/rs/pod status + pod describe) on rollout failure.
2026-03-08T13:30:39Z: Fixed build-orchestrator bootstrap build failure due to readonly module mode without checksums: added rag-stack/services/build-orchestrator/go.sum, updated build-orchestrator Dockerfile to copy go.sum and build with GOFLAGS=-mod=readonly, and restored build-orchestrator go.mod to a minimal direct-requirements form.
2026-03-08T13:25:37Z: Fixed build-pipeline/install.sh journal verification logic to prevent stale-step skips: build-orchestrator-image now verifies actual registry image availability via skopeo inspect (instead of namespace existence), and build-orchestrator now verifies deployment readiness via rollout status before marking step done.
2026-03-07T19:28:08Z: Improved build efficiency for Go services by removing per-build 'go get ...@latest' and 'go mod tidy' in service Dockerfiles, switching to deterministic builds with GOFLAGS=-mod=readonly, adding rag-web-ui go.sum to dependency-cache layer, and enabling Kaniko layer caching in build-orchestrator (--cache=true with --cache-repo=<registry>/kaniko-cache).
2026-03-07T19:20:36Z: Hardened rag-stack/build-all-on-cluster.sh wait behavior: replaced fragile job-name-based completion waits with registry image-availability checks (skopeo inspect on registry.hierocracy.home:5000/<service>:<version>) plus timeout/poll controls, and added fallback diagnostics (jobs list + build-orchestrator logs) on failure.
2026-03-07T19:12:13Z: Enhanced scripts/cache-registry-images.sh backup mode to skip re-exporting images already present in the latest bundle: added BACKUP_SKIP_EXISTING (default true), reuses prior bundle image directories via hardlink/copy fallback when repo:tag matches, and still writes a complete image-refs.tsv for the new bundle.
2026-03-07T19:02:54Z: Added scripts/fill-missing-backup-images.sh to automate post-backup completeness: compares install-image-plan image refs against the latest/selected backup bundle, pulls and caches only missing images, pushes them to local registry, and optionally runs a final backup to capture newly added refs.
2026-03-07T18:56:53Z: Fixed registry backup API pagination handling in scripts/cache-registry-images.sh by replacing hardcoded /v2/_catalog?n=10000 with paginated catalog traversal using CACHE_CATALOG_PAGE_SIZE (default 100), parsing Link headers, and aggregating repositories across pages.
2026-03-07T18:41:49Z: Fixed FRESH_INSTALL journal hygiene across nested installers: added clear_all_journals() in scripts/journal-helper.sh to purge all journal artifacts under ~/.complete-build/journal (including sub-journals like pulsar/*.done), and wired setup-complete.sh to invoke this purge at startup when FRESH_INSTALL=true before any step checks run.
2026-03-07T18:30:13Z: Added scripts/suggest-image-plan-updates.sh: interactive updater for scripts/install-image-plan.sh that checks pinned semver-like image tags against upstream registry tags (via skopeo list-tags), proposes newer versions, prompts per update, applies approved tag replacements, and optionally propagates matching fixed-ref updates to related files.
2026-03-07T18:20:15Z: Updated scripts/mirror-all-images.sh to avoid redundant downloads/pushes by checking whether target repo:tag already exists in the local registry with skopeo inspect. If present, the image is skipped (status=skip, cache=registry-hit); otherwise normal cache-first pull and push flow is applied.
2026-03-07T18:15:02Z: Integrated tag-aware upstream image caching into scripts/mirror-all-images.sh so image pulls check local shared cache first (SOURCE_CACHE_ROOT), download from internet only on cache miss, and update cache automatically before pushing to local registry. Added SKOPEO_SRC_TLS_VERIFY and cache-hit/cache-update timing markers for visibility.
2026-03-07T17:53:24Z: Optimized Rook-Ceph bootstrap pull behavior to reduce install latency and avoid image-pull storms before local registry availability: added scripts/prefetch-node-images.sh to pre-pull selected image groups into node-local caches via temporary DaemonSets; wired setup-01-basic.sh to run this prefetch step (rook-ceph-image-prefetch) before rook-ceph operator deployment; pinned wipe-disks busybox images to busybox:1.36; and added busybox:1.36 to the storage image group in scripts/install-image-plan.sh.
2026-03-07T17:28:35Z: Added scripts/cache-registry-images.sh to support offline image persistence across cluster rebuilds: backup mode exports all repo:tag images from local registry to /mnt/hegemon-share (timestamped bundle with refs/index), restore mode repopulates the registry from cached bundles, and list mode enumerates available bundles.
2026-03-07T17:23:01Z: Regenerated architecture documentation to include Iteration 6 memory design: updated RAG Stack Architecture.md, RAG-Diagram.mmd, and RAG-Build-Flow.mmd with memory-controller service, memory Pulsar topics (write/retrieve/pack/audit), memory data model references, and phased memory enablement rollout.
2026-03-07T17:06:45Z: Expanded Iteration 6 Phase 1 into concrete implementation artifacts: added TimescaleDB migration rag-stack/infrastructure/timescaledb/iteration-6-phase1-memory.sql (memory_items, memory_links, memory_events, trigger, indexes), added contract schemas (MemoryWriteRequest, MemoryRetrieveRequest, MemoryPack) under rag-stack/contracts, added shared Go contract types in rag-stack/services/common/memory/contracts.go, and updated iteration-6.md with exact file-level sequence for first-pass integration.
2026-03-07T16:53:56Z: Added iteration-6.md with a concrete implementation roadmap for local prompt memory and recall (Miras/Titans-inspired): memory data model/contracts, salience+retention logic, retrieval composition, service/topic integration, observability/evaluation, Kubernetes rollout, deliverables, risks, and exit criteria.
2026-03-07T08:40:00Z: Implemented phase-1 install efficiency scaffolding: added explicit dependency plan at scripts/install-image-plan.sh (image groups + step-to-group mappings), upgraded scripts/mirror-all-images.sh to support group/step driven dry-run or apply mirroring (--group, --step, --list-groups, --list-steps, MIRROR_GROUPS env), and added per-step timing logging to setup-complete.sh. Timing records are appended to both the active journal and a persistent timing log at ~/.complete-build/journal/setup-complete-timing.log without changing step order.
2026-03-06T21:20:00Z: Implemented build pipeline observability and concurrency improvements in two phases. Phase 1: extended build-orchestrator to emit structured build status events (queued/job_created/pod_running/running/succeeded/failed), publish to BUILD_STATUS_TOPIC, expose /health, /status, and /events (SSE), and serve a lightweight in-cluster dashboard UI at /. Updated orchestrator Kubernetes manifest with HTTP port/probes/resources, status topic and concurrency env vars, pod-read RBAC, and a ClusterIP service. Phase 2: added orchestrator MAX_CONCURRENT_BUILDS worker-pool control and end-to-end completion tracking before ACK/NACK. Optimized build dispatch by uploading one shared source tarball per build-all run and reusing SOURCE_URL/SOURCE_TARBALL across service triggers, with configurable trigger fan-out via TRIGGER_PARALLELISM.
2026-03-06T20:12:00Z: Diagnosed and fixed GPU Operator validator failures on hierophant. Root cause was Talos NVIDIA userspace layout not matching validator expectations under /run/nvidia/driver. Validated fix by creating /run/nvidia/driver/usr/bin and /run/nvidia/driver/usr/lib64 symlinks to Talos host paths and confirmed ClusterPolicy transitioned to Ready. Applied persistent live DaemonSet patch for nvidia-talos-validation-fix to continuously maintain symlinks and validation markers. Removed conflicting legacy Helm releases (nvidia-device-plugin and dcgm-exporter), leaving only gpu-operator managed components.
2026-03-06T19:59:57Z: Aligned complete-build NVIDIA installation with the Talos-aware GPU Operator flow to reduce validator/driver conflicts after Talos upgrades. Replaced standalone device-plugin/DCGM install path with GPU Operator Helm install (driver.enabled=false, toolkit.enabled=false), applied RuntimeClass and Talos validation-fix resources, and added best-effort cleanup for legacy nvidia-device-plugin/nvidia-dcgm-exporter releases.
2026-03-06T00:40:00Z: Resolved Go module metadata issues for rag-worker, db-adapter, and qdrant-adapter by declaring app-builds/common in each service module and running go mod tidy after pinning telemetry dependencies in services/common. This removed the genproto ambiguity during module resolution and restored successful go test -mod=readonly compilation for all three services.
2026-03-06T00:20:00Z: Added lightweight HTTP /health listeners to rag-worker, db-adapter, and qdrant-adapter Go services (port 8080) and wired Kubernetes startup/readiness/liveness probes to those endpoints. Updated rag-worker and db-adapter deployments to expose containerPort 8080 for probe targeting.
2026-03-06T00:00:00Z: Standardized service image deployment on VERSION by introducing __VERSION__ tags in RAG service/test manifests and rendering them in setup-all.sh and test runners. Hardened deployment reliability with explicit rollout/job/secret waits, safer shell options, and a robust TimescaleDB primary wait that avoids early exit when no pod exists yet. Improved build reliability by making build-all-on-cluster wait per expected Kaniko job and by failing on push errors in build-and-push.sh. Added/expanded resource requests/limits and health probes where viable (llm-gateway, rag-ingestion, rag-web-ui, qdrant, plus sizing updates on worker/adapter/object-store workloads). Fixed kubernetes-dashboard script reliability by defining SCRIPT_DIR and enabling strict shell error handling.
2026-03-05T15:45:00Z: Resolved circular dependency in build pipeline by moving Apache Pulsar installation before cluster-native image builds in setup-complete.sh. Fixed trigger-build.sh to use the correct 'apache-pulsar' namespace and added robustness by waiting for the Pulsar toolset pod to be ready before dispatching build tasks. Updated init-rag-pulsar.sh with similar readiness checks to ensure reliable stack bootstrap on hierophant.
2026-03-05T15:15:00Z: Resolved 'chown /kaniko/buildcontext: operation not permitted' error by allowing Kaniko jobs to run as root. While PodSecurity 'restricted' warnings are emitted, they do not block execution on this cluster. Kaniko requires root privileges to unpack base image filesystems, which is incompatible with 'runAsNonRoot: true'. Maintained non-root security for all other components (init containers and orchestrator service). Continued using the 'dir://' context optimization to avoid extra extraction steps within Kaniko. Verified fix with a successful bootstrap build of the build-orchestrator image.
2026-03-05T14:55:00Z: Resolved 'unknown build context prefix' error in Kaniko jobs by implementing an init container approach for build context retrieval. Since Kaniko does not support 'http://' (only 'https://'), pre-signed URLs from the internal Rook-Ceph RGW were rejected. The new system uses a 'busybox' init container to download the context tarball via 'wget' to a shared 'EmptyDir' volume. Kaniko then consumes the context from this local volume using the 'tar://' prefix. Updated 'bootstrap-orchestrator.sh', 'main.go', and 'kaniko-job-template.yaml' to support this robust, decoupled architecture.
2026-03-05T14:35:00Z: Resolved '403 Forbidden' and 'InvalidAccessKeyId' errors in Kaniko jobs by switching from direct S3 context retrieval to pre-signed URLs. Modified 'bootstrap-orchestrator.sh', 'trigger-build.sh', and the 'build-orchestrator' service to generate 1-hour pre-signed URLs via the uploader pods. This eliminates the need for Kaniko's embedded AWS SDK to handle custom S3 endpoints or credentials, significantly increasing reliability and security.
2026-03-05T14:10:00Z: Fixed 'unsupported protocol scheme' error in Kaniko jobs by adding 'http://' prefix to S3 endpoints and using correct 'AWS_S3_ENDPOINT' and 'AWS_S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE' environment variables in 'bootstrap-orchestrator.sh', 'main.go', and 'kaniko-job-template.yaml'. This ensures the Go AWS SDK used by Kaniko can correctly parse the custom S3 endpoint and use path-style addressing for Rook-Ceph.
2026-03-05T12:40:00Z: Modified 'bootstrap-orchestrator.sh' to ensure the 'kaniko-bootstrap-orchestrator' job is deleted if it exists before launching the bootstrap build. This prevents 'Job.batch already exists' errors and ensures a clean run of the bootstrap process on hierophant.
2026-03-05T11:48:00Z: Fixed environment variable expansion bug in the cluster-native build pipeline. Changed '${BUCKET_NAME}' to '$(BUCKET_NAME)' in Kaniko Job arguments in 'bootstrap-orchestrator.sh' and the 'build-orchestrator' Go service. This allows Kubernetes to correctly expand the bucket name from the environment before passing it to the Kaniko executor, resolving 'invalid character' parsing errors in the S3 context URL.
2026-03-03T12:35:00Z: Fixed 'tar' dependency issue in build pipeline bootstrap and trigger scripts. Replaced 'kubectl cp' with a piped 'kubectl exec' to stream source tarballs directly to S3 via 'aws s3 cp -'. This allows using the lightweight 'amazon/aws-cli' image which lacks 'tar', resolving Step 1.5.8 failures on hierophant.
2026-03-01T12:07:00Z: Thoroughly audited and updated node affinity and placement configuration across the entire stack. Pinned all APM (Mimir, Tempo, Grafana, Otel-Collector, Prometheus), Rook-Ceph, Core Infrastructure (Registry, Qdrant, Traefik, Build Orchestrator), and RAG Stack Microservices (llm-gateway, rag-worker, ui, db-adapter, qdrant-adapter, rag-ingestion) to 'role: storage-node' (worker nodes). Pinned Ollama to 'role: inference-node' (dedicated GPU nodes). Fixed Pulsar node labeling script to target only 'worker*' nodes and removed incorrect labels from inference nodes on hierophant. This ensures inference nodes are reserved exclusively for LLM workloads. Archived original files and bumped build version to 1.5.8.
2026-02-28T13:27:00Z: Refactored journaling to per-user path (~/.complete-build/journal) with unique file names and forceful cleanup (rm -f). Fixed APM Step 1.2 using old /tmp/.install.sh_journal path causing permission prompts. Updated INSTALLATION.md accordingly.
2026-02-28T12:55:00Z: Updated all architecture documentation (RAG Stack Architecture.md, RAG-Build-Flow.mmd, RAG-Diagram.mmd) to reflect Iteration 5 state. Added APM stack, cluster-native build pipeline (Kaniko/S3), and service refactoring details. Updated README.md with the new service list and INSTALLATION.md reference. Added a 'Progress & Status' section to iteration-5.md documenting the completion of observability and build stabilization phases.
2026-02-28T12:30:00Z: Scaled Loki to 3 replicas with horizontal spreading (podAntiAffinity) and increased replication factor to 3 in infrastructure/APM/loki/values.yaml.template. Enforced worker node affinity for all Loki components to ensure they run on 3 different worker nodes.
2026-02-28T10:35:00Z: Expanded test suite with 'sad path' coverage (rag-stack/tests/sad_path_test.py) to trigger and verify error logs (405, 400, malformed Pulsar payloads). Configured Grafana Alloy as a DaemonSet to collect container logs from all nodes and ship them to Loki. Created a new 'RAG Stack Logs & Errors' Grafana dashboard (rag-logs.json) and integrated it along with the 'RAG Stack Performance Overview' (rag-performance.json) into the Grafana operator manifests for automated provisioning. Bumped build version to 1.5.8 across all service deployments.
2026-02-28T09:47:00Z: Audited and enhanced error handling and logging across all Go services (llm-gateway, rag-worker, db-adapter, qdrant-adapter, rag-web-ui, and object-store-mgr). Implemented comprehensive checks for JSON unmarshaling, database operations, Pulsar messaging, and external API calls (S3, LLM). All errors are now logged with contextual IDs (correlation_id, session_id) to facilitate debugging and observability. Archived original files and bumped build version to 1.5.5.
2026-02-28T09:15:00Z: Refactored all Go services to use a shared 'common' module (rag-stack/services/common) for OpenTelemetry and metrics. Consolidated 6 identical otel.go files into one. Implemented custom OTLP metrics (counters for requests/tasks/errors and histograms for latencies) in llm-gateway, rag-worker, db-adapter, and qdrant-adapter. Created a 'RAG Stack Performance Overview' Grafana dashboard (rag-performance.json) for real-time visualization of these metrics. Bumped build version to 1.5.4 across Go services.
2026-02-27T18:30:00Z: Stabilized Mimir and Tempo rings by performing a 'Cold Start' (scaling all distributed components to 0 and scaling up Ingesters first). This cleared the stale in-memory memberlist state that was causing 'empty ring' and '0 live replicas' errors. Also fixed the Grafana Alloy DCGM scrape configuration by updating the service name from 'dcgm-exporter' to 'nvidia-dcgm-exporter', restoring GPU metric flow to Mimir.
2026-02-27T14:15:00Z: Implemented persistent authentication for Kubernetes Dashboard by creating a long-lived ServiceAccount token using a Kubernetes Secret (admin-user-token). Updated infrastructure/kubernetes-dashboard/dashboard.sh and created admin-token-secret.yaml to automate this process. This replaces short-lived tokens and allows users to 'store' the credentials in their browser or password manager for long-term access.
2026-02-27T17:55:00Z: Reduced the log frequency of loki-canary from 1s to 10s by patching the DaemonSet with the -interval=10s flag. This resolves the issue of high-frequency synthetic 'p' log lines causing excessive noise in Loki.
2026-02-27T17:30:00Z: Exposed the Kubernetes Dashboard via a dedicated LoadBalancer service (kubernetes-dashboard-lb). Created infrastructure/kubernetes-dashboard/dashboard-lb.yaml and updated dashboard.sh to automate its deployment. Verified external IP 172.20.1.24 assigned via PureLB.
2026-02-27T17:15:00Z: Integrated Kubernetes Dashboard into the infrastructure setup. Created infrastructure/kubernetes-dashboard/dashboard.sh for automated deployment via Helm (with YAML fallback) and configured Traefik Ingress for dashboard.hierocracy.home. Added an admin-user service account and provided token generation. Updated setup-complete.sh to include the dashboard setup as Step 1.5.5.
2026-02-27T16:45:00Z: Optimized build system by parallelizing the image build and push process. The build-all-images.sh script now launches all service builds in parallel, significantly reducing wall-clock time on the 56-core hierophant host. Incremented stack version to 1.5.3 and updated all Kubernetes manifests.
2026-02-27T16:15:00Z: Completed rollout and verification of version 1.5.2. Verified Multi-Model Recursive RAG pipeline stage transitions (INGRESS -> PLANNING -> RETRIEVING -> EXECUTING -> COMPLETED) via e2e-test suite. Confirmed project-local build artifact storage in ai-changes/build-output and implemented human-readable duration reports.
2026-02-27T15:35:00Z: Optimized build system for better visibility and storage: Removed -debug-trace from all Go Dockerfiles. Updated build-all-images.sh to use the project-local ai-changes/build-output/ directory on hierophant for all logs and reports. Implemented full stdout/stderr redirection to separate log files per service build/push step, providing a complete audit trail of the build process.
2026-02-27T15:25:00Z: Enhanced build transparency: Updated build-all-images.sh with a duration-tracking wrapper and a summary report generation feature. Modified service Dockerfiles to use 'go build -v' for verbose package compilation, providing detailed insight into the build process beyond basic traces.
2026-02-27T15:05:00Z: Completed rollout of version 1.5.1 for Iteration 5. Verified Multi-Model Recursive RAG pipeline with end-to-end tests including thinking trace, database CRUD, and context-aware responses. Implemented build trace extraction to /tmp/build-output and provisioned a 'RAG Overview' dashboard in Grafana (monitoring namespace). Reset 'app' user database password and updated db-adapter to listen to stage-based results topic.
2026-02-27T10:00:00Z: Updated guidelines.md with new versioning policy (major.minor.build). Bumped iteration components to 1.5.1 and updated Kubernetes manifests accordingly. Purged legacy Pulsar topic references across services and tests.
2026-02-26T14:15:00Z: Resolved image pull and initialization issues for LLM pods. Updated ollama.sh to use tag 0.15.6 and explicitly provided model names to Helm to fix PostStartHook crashes. Removed redundant nvidia-operator-validator component from gpu-operator namespace on Talos nodes, as it was failing driver validation and functional GPUs were already confirmed.
2026-02-25T13:15:00Z: Verified container registry contents on hierophant. Confirmed llm-gateway:1.0.0 and rag-worker:1.0.0 are present. LLM models (llama3.1:latest, granite3.1-dense:8b) and ollama:0.15.6 are also available in the local registry.
2026-02-25T11:30:00Z: Enhanced test suite with recursive_rag_test.py to verify Multi-Model RAG flow and status broadcasting. Updated test-job.yaml and run-tests.sh to include the new test and updated stage-based Pulsar topics.
2026-02-25T10:15:00Z: Implemented Multi-Model Recursive RAG in rag-worker. Added stage-based handling (ingress, plan, exec), sub-query decomposition, grounding guard, and recursion logic. Updated llm-gateway to use new stage-based Pulsar topics.
2026-02-25T09:30:00Z: Renamed 'ollama-planner' and 'ollama-executor' to 'llm-planner' and 'llm-executor' in iteration-5.md to support service-agnostic naming conventions.
2026-02-25T09:25:00Z: Updated iteration-5.md to emphasize bite-sized prompt decomposition, strict context pruning for 8GB VRAM, and verbose tracking for experimentation. Refined aggregation and status broadcasting requirements.
